items.title: Late Cowboys' player Kneeland diagnosed with CTE
items.body_text: Former Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland has been posthumously diagnosed with CTE.

items.title: Amid case, Arnold clears waivers, now a free agent...
items.body_text: Former Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold, 23, facing legal issues in Florida after he was arrested on felony charges of armed robbery and kidnapping in Tampa, cleared waivers Monday afternoon and has become a free agent after two seasons with Detroit.

items.title: Sources: CB Douglas to sign with Commanders
items.body_text: Free agent CB Rasul Douglas is planning to sign a one-year deal with the Washington Commanders worth up to $3.8 million, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

items.title: Bears QB Williams gifts Pope autographed jersey
items.body_text: Bears quarterback Caleb Williams sent an autographed jersey to Pope Leo XIV, a Chicago native and the first American-born pope in the history of the Catholic Church.
items.author: Courtney Cronin

items.title: Chiefs' Kelce, Swift marry in ceremony at MSG
items.body_text: The pop superstar and Kansas City Chiefs tight end said "I do" in front of a celebrity-filled guest list at Madison Square Garden on Friday.
items.author: Tory Barron

items.title: Calais Cambell's mother dead, brother charged
items.body_text: The brother of Ravens defensive lineman Calais Campbell has been charged with murder after police found their 71-year-old mother dead at a home in Atlanta during a welfare check.

items.title: Former Titans scout Taylor found guilty of murder
items.body_text: Blaise Taylor, a former defensive back at Arkansas State and NFL scout for the Titans, was found guilty of murdering his girlfriend and her unborn child Wednesday in a Nashville courtroom.

items.title: Chris Johnson aims to revive Ice Bucket Challenge
items.body_text: Former NFL running back Chris Johnson is calling for the revival of the Ice Bucket Challenge to raise awareness of ALS as he fights the progressive nervous system disease.
